100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On May 29, 1926, the British Empire faced turmoil as a general strike continued, with workers demanding better wages and conditions, signaling growing labor unrest. Meanwhile, in the United States, a significant trial was underway as the Scopes Monkey Trial loomed on the horizon, highlighting the clash between modern science and traditional beliefs. Internationally, tensions persisted in Germany as the nation grappled with economic instability and reparations from World War I.
